narrative:
Marion Twp. township has 23,219 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
